reviews.comment:
Saliendo desde las Grutas es el punto medio hasta Bariloche. Ideal para recargar energías y comprar. Buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Starting from Las Grutas, this is the halfway point to Bariloche. Ideal for recharging and shopping. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Un error elegirla como punto de detención.
No andaba el aire y un solo playero para cargar combustible.
Más de media hora para una simple carga. Increíble lo que están haciendo con YPF. Última vez que paramos acá.

(Translated by Google)
Choosing this station as a stop was a mistake. The air conditioning wasn't working, and there was only one attendant to fill up the tank. It took over half an hour for a simple fill-up. It's unbelievable what they're doing with YPF. Last time we stop here.

reviews.comment:
Las empleadas del shop son muy desatentas, conversan entre si mientras te atienden y estan muy poco dispuestas a solucionar temas que deberian tener previstos, como el almuerzo. Tuvimos que hablar con la gente del resto para que accedan a hacer 2 sandwiches de milanesa. Ellas contestaban que no habia mas, como si en ese lugar hubiese otra oferta para almorzar. Los ACA estan ubicados en puntos estrategicos de la ruta, porque son una lugar de SERVICIOS, estas empleadas perdieron la esencia.

(Translated by Google)
The shop employees are very inattentive; they chat amongst themselves while serving you and are very unwilling to address issues they should have addressed, such as lunch. We had to speak with the staff at the other location to get them to make two breaded cutlet sandwiches. They replied that they didn't have any more, as if there were any other lunch options there. ACA service stations are located at strategic points along the highway because they are service establishments; these employees have lost sight of that purpose.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21neFEyTm9PRVJPV0ZSSU1VWmFabmRZYTJWS2JYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente iluminación nos hospedamos a 70 mil la noche cenamos unas milanesas espectaculares con bebida para dos a 20 mil .súper recomendable.solo ví como personal en acá a una sola persona. Pero súper eficaz y amable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent lighting. We stayed for 70,000 pesos a night and had spectacular milanesas with drinks for two for 20,000 pesos. Highly recommended. I only saw one staff member here, but they were incredibly efficient and friendly.
